Rec/Utility ATV

Adventure awaits with Honda's FourTrax line of all-terrain vehicles. Take on any job or terrain with unbeatable reliability and easy handling. Perfect for outdoor enthusiasts, farmers, ranchers, and construction workers. Whether it's work or play, you can trust a Honda ATV to make the most of your time in the great outdoors.

Compare Rec/Utility ATVs

Discover unshakable dependability

With a range of rec/utility ATVs to choose from, you're sure to find the perfect FourTrax for your needs, from the farm to the fishing hole.

Built to conquer

Rec/Utility
Accessorized Model Shown
Accessorized Model Shown

Rec/Utility
Accessorized Model Shown
Accessorized Model Shown

Check out the
2026 FourTrax Rubicon 700 4x4 Automatic

1 / 3
FourTrax Rubicon 700 4x4 Automatic
FourTrax Rubicon 700 4x4 Automatic
Engine Type
675cc liquid-cooled longitudinally mounted single-cylinder four-stroke
Transmission
Automatic with hydraulic torque converter; three forward gears, reverse, and electronic controls
Front Suspension
Independent double-wishbone; 6.9-inch travel
Rear Suspension
Independent dual-arm; 8.0-inch travel
Seat Height
34.8 inches

Easy-to-read instrument screen

Everything about the Rubicon 700 is top-of-the-line, including the instrument display. It’s larger than the previous model, making it easier to read, and features a tachometer and an updated background color for improved visibility in direct sunlight.

Large 26-inch tires

Whether off-roading or on the job site, having big wheels and tires means you can go more places and get more done. Hence, we fitted the Rubicon 700 with massive 26-inch tires that have an aggressive tread pattern for better traction and improved ground clearance.

LED handlebar headlight

Visibility is the name of the game. For this reason, the Rubicon 700 comes with a handlebar-mounted LED headlight. The light is a big boost in illumination. Plus, it moves with the handlebars, which helps increase visibility around corners.

View Specs FourTrax Rubicon 700 4x4 Automatic 2026
Build Your Own FourTrax Rubicon 700 4x4 Automatic 2026
